variant_or_spec: 850 mm frame-only kit with carbon-fiber landing gear
notes: Select the frame-kit option. Verify motor-plate hole pattern and delivered weight before buying propulsion.
Six flight motors plus one spare. Full purchase follows one-motor thrust testing and measured all-up mass of 6.0 kg or less.

product_name: Hobbywing XRotor Pro 40A ESC dual pack
notes: Four dual packs provide six flight ESCs and two spares. Use documented PWM input.

product_name: SunnySky EOLO carbon-reinforced nylon propeller pair
variant_or_spec: 15 x 5.5 inch; one CW and one CCW per pair
notes: Three flight pairs plus one spare pair. Verify adjacent-tip clearance and hub fit before operation.

variant_or_spec: Plastic case; no PM02/PM06/PM07 power module
notes: The main propulsion feed must bypass PM02. Use PDB-HEX sensing and a correctly wired POWER1 harness.
Includes the fixed carbon-fiber GPS mount and plugs into the Pixhawk 6C GPS1 port.

role: Main power distribution and current sensing
notes: Source from a reputable seller and verify authenticity. ArduPilot BATT_AMP_PERVLT is documented as 80 by Matek.
Use one rail for Pixhawk backup power and one dedicated rail for the Raspberry Pi. Do not power the Pi from the flight controller.
Use a legally compliant output-power setting for the operating location.
Connect to a Pixhawk UART using CRSF and configure RC-loss failsafes before propeller testing.
One flight pack plus one rotation/spare pack. Each pack is listed at about 1.52 kg, so the 6.0 kg all-up-mass gate is mandatory.

product_name: HOTA D6 Pro dual-channel smart charger
notes: Requires safe LiPo charging practice and the correct AS150/XT150-to-XT60 charge lead rated for the chosen charge current.
Format as recommended by ArduPilot and confirm logging before flight testing.
Confirm cell orientation and condition before installing in the RadioMaster Pocket battery tray.

product_name: Arducam B0202 IMX291 USB camera module
role: RGB video for onboard smoke/fire research
notes: Selected because the owned Raspberry Pi 4B has a failed CSI port. Validate exposure, field of view and detection accuracy before flight.

product_name: High-current wiring and safety hardware allowance
variant_or_spec: AS150/XT150 mating connectors; 10/12/14/16 AWG silicone wire; bullets; capacitors; fuse; heat-shrink; straps
role: Power harness, strain relief and safe assembly
notes: Final connector and wire quantities depend on the measured frame routing. Size and fuse the harness from measured current, not claimed battery capability.

product_name: Motor thrust stand and inline wattmeter allowance
variant_or_spec: Suitable for 15-inch propellers and at least 30A / 6S measurement
role: Acceptance testing before full propulsion purchase
notes: The test setup must safely clear a 15-inch propeller and record thrust, current, voltage and temperature.

product_name: Shipping, sales tax and contingency reserve
variant_or_spec: Balances the detailed BOM to the US$2,200 funding goal
role: Import, price movement and small missing hardware
notes: Recalculate immediately before ordering. Do not use the reserve to skip the thrust-test and all-up-mass gates.

role: Companion computer running OpenCV and MAVLink
notes: Use the dedicated 5.2V UBEC and USB camera. Do not power the Pi from a Pixhawk peripheral rail.

product_name: Prometheus software, CAD and current quadcopter prototype

notes: The owned H743-WLITE and BN-880 can support early bench work, but the funded configuration uses Pixhawk 6C and M10.
